paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 42 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 23 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 42 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 1 task should be active but is stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. 3 projects cleared their overdue lists — well done.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.
**Karim Merchant (JOSE-TEST10):** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Ginger Brown:** **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508):** 4 overdue payments — schedule work is fine but material delays will hit soon if these aren't processed. **19 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 1 upcoming task still unassigned. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

269 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **120 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 7 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 45 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199) and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is completely clean — no overdue tasks. Keep this up.
**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 32 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Clean — 2 tasks in progress. 1 upcoming unassigned. 36 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Schedule is clean. Focus on keeping active tasks on track and confirming upcoming deliveries.
